studio.text:

nerdcommand.info/studio

#AIFilm #ContentCreator #NerdCommand

Exodus Horizon Legacy. Blood Relic. Hero's Open Source.

3 cinematic universes. All AI-produced. All from one command.

NerdCommand Studio is the autonomous production pipeline that doesn't need a crew — just a vision.

Early access open now 👇
nerdcommand.info/studio

#NerdCommand #AIStudio #IndieFilm

The AI film pipeline that actually ships:

1. Script parsed into shot bible
2. ComfyUI + Wan2.2 renders each scene
3. Color grade applied automatically (CINEMATIC / NOIR / FLASHBACK)
4. Audio synced + fades applied
5. Final cut assembled losslessly

You write. Studio delivers.

#AIProduction #FilmMaking #NerdCommand

What if you could color grade your entire film in one word?

NerdCommand Studio presets:
→ CINEMATIC — warm shadows, punchy highlights
→ NOIR — high contrast, desaturated
→ FLASHBACK — sepia warmth, crushed blacks
→ COOL — blue-tinted, modern
→ WARM — golden hour all day

One flag. Full grade. Every scene.

nerdcommand.info/studio

#ColorGrade #AIFilm #NerdCommand
